summary: Added maildir-store = ~/Mail and multi-file-strategy = act-dir to both [gmail] and [logos] accounts.conf sections in modules/home/email/aerc.nix, plus a forward-compat comment (upstream maildir-store -> enable-maildir deprecation) and an a-unprompted design-decision comment. home-manager build --flake .#benjamin passed (exit 0) and the rendered accounts.conf was confirmed correct. Live-mail verification (Phases 3-6 of the plan) requires driving aerc's interactive TUI and mutating real Gmail/Logos mail via mail-sync, which this autonomous agent must not do; those phases are marked [PARTIAL] with deviation notes and translated into a manual verification checklist in the implementation summary.

artifacts.summary: Added maildir-store/multi-file-strategy to [gmail] and [logos] accounts.conf sections plus forward-compat and a-unprompted comments
Implementation summary with build verification results and a manual live-mail verification checklist for the user
Phase-end handoff after completing the autonomous config-edit and build phases

completion_data.completion_summary: Enabled aerc's notmuch-backend archive/delete file moves by adding maildir-store and multi-file-strategy = act-dir to both Gmail and Logos accounts.conf sections; home-manager build verified. Live-mail verification against real Gmail/Logos mailboxes is deferred to the user via a manual checklist, since it requires interactive TUI use and real mail mutation that an autonomous agent must not perform.

next_steps: User must run home-manager switch --flake .#benjamin (or equivalent activation) and then follow the manual verification checklist in summaries/01_enable-archive-action-summary.md to complete live-mail verification (Phases 3-6).
